name: Shannon channel capacity
description: Capacity from bandwidth and linear SNR

name: Free-space path loss
description: FSPL using distance km and frequency MHz

name: Signal to interference plus noise ratio
description: Signal divided by interference plus noise

name: Coherent BPSK BER
description: BPSK bit error rate in AWGN

name: Nyquist symbol rate
description: Maximum symbol rate of ideal baseband channel

name: Identity MIMO capacity
expression: C = log2 det(I + rho / Nt * H H^H)
description: MIMO spectral efficiency with total SNR convention

name: Friis received power
expression: Pr = Pt Gt Gr (lambda / (4 pi d))^2

name: SNR dB to linear
description: Convert a power ratio in dB to linear
